key.name: sidebar-width
key.summary: Sidebar width in pixels

key.name: rolodex
key.summary: Pinned contacts shown first in Tab completion

key.name: pinned-rooms
key.summary: Pinned room IDs

key.name: timeline-limit
key.summary: Number of timeline events per room during sync

key.name: timeout-secs
key.summary: Sync timeout in seconds

key.name: font-family
key.summary: Font family for message text (empty = system default)

key.name: font-size
key.summary: Font size in points for message text

key.name: tint-color
key.summary: Message area tint color as CSS hex (empty = no tint)

key.name: tint-opacity
key.summary: Message area tint opacity (0.0–0.5)

key.name: sidebar-tint-color
key.summary: Sidebar tint color as CSS hex (empty = no tint)

key.name: sidebar-tint-opacity
key.summary: Sidebar tint opacity (0.0–0.5)

key.name: tint-color2
key.summary: Message area gradient end color (empty = solid tint)

key.name: sidebar-tint-color2
key.summary: Sidebar gradient end color (empty = solid tint)

key.name: colorize-nicks
key.summary: Color sender names by Matrix user ID

key.name: bookmark-highlight-color
key.summary: Highlight color for bookmarked messages (CSS hex)

key.name: new-message-highlight-color
key.summary: Background tint color for new (unread) messages (CSS hex)

key.name: watch-enabled
key.summary: Whether the room interest watcher is active

key.name: watch-terms
key.summary: Terms to watch for in room messages (semantic matching)

key.name: watch-threshold
key.summary: Cosine similarity threshold for a watch term match (0.0–1.0)

key.name: room-preview-extra
key.summary: Extra instructions appended to the room preview prompt

key.name: ollama-endpoint
key.summary: Ollama API endpoint URL

key.name: ollama-model
key.summary: Ollama model name for AI summaries (default: qwen2.5:3b)

key.name: ollama-enabled
key.summary: Whether AI summaries (Ctrl+click popover) are enabled

key.name: ai-setup-done
key.summary: Whether the first-run AI setup dialog has been shown

key.name: plugin-rolodex-enabled
key.summary: Whether the Rolodex contact book plugin is active

key.name: plugin-pinning-enabled
key.summary: Whether the local message pinning plugin is active

key.name: plugin-motd-enabled
key.summary: Whether the room topic change (MOTD) tracker plugin is active

key.name: plugin-community-health-enabled
key.summary: Whether the community health monitor plugin is active

key.name: first-start
key.summary: Whether the app has never been launched before
key.description: Set to false once the user completes initial login and E2EE setup.

key.name: known-servers
key.summary: Matrix homeservers to suggest in user search
key.description: When the user directory search finds no match, hikyaku suggests "@name:server" completions for each server in this list.

key.name: ai-detect-conflict
key.summary: Include conflict and spam pattern detection in AI metrics summaries

key.name: ai-detect-coc
key.summary: Include code-of-conduct violation signals in AI metrics summaries
